title: Stardew Valley
description: Build your dream farm, befriend villagers, and escape to the countryside.
fun_fact: Creator Eric Barone spent 4 years developing this entire game by himself, including all art, music, and code!

title: Animal Crossing: New Horizons
description: Create your paradise on a deserted island.
fun_fact: The game sold 13.4 million copies in its first 6 weeks, breaking the record for most digital sales!

title: Unpacking
description: Unpack belongings and discover life stories through the objects we carry.
fun_fact: The developers spent months studying real-world items to make pixel art objects immediately recognizable.

title: A Short Hike
description: Hike up a mountain at your own pace in this charming little adventure.
fun_fact: This cozy game was made in just 1 month as part of a game jam and later expanded into a full release!

title: Coffee Talk
description: Listen to people's stories and serve them coffee in this cozy visual novel.
fun_fact: The game is inspired by classic 90s coffee shop culture in Seattle.

title: Spiritfarer
description: A cozy management game about dying where you care for spirits before releasing them.
fun_fact: The developers consulted with grief counselors during development to handle themes of death sensitively.

title: PowerWash Simulator
description: Wash away your worries with the soothing power of water.
fun_fact: The game features over 40 vehicles and locations to clean with surprisingly accurate water physics!

title: Dorfromantik
description: Build a beautiful landscape by placing tiles in this relaxing puzzle game.
fun_fact: The word 'Dorfromantik' is German and roughly translates to 'village romanticism' - a longing for rural life.

title: LEGO Builder's Journey
description: A poetic puzzle experience with beautiful LEGO brick-building.
fun_fact: This was the first LEGO game developed in collaboration with LEGO's own in-house design team.

title: Islanders
description: A minimalist city-builder about creating beautiful islands.
fun_fact: The entire game was created by a team of just 4 people in Germany!

title: The Gardens Between
description: Manipulate time to solve puzzles and explore a friendship.
fun_fact: The game has no dialogue or text - the entire story is told through visuals and environmental storytelling.

title: Gris
description: A serene, evocative experience about a young girl dealing with loss.
fun_fact: The stunning watercolor art style was hand-painted by artist Conrad Roset, with each frame carefully crafted.

title: Mini Metro
description: Design subway lines for a growing city in this minimalist puzzle game.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by Harry Beck's iconic 1931 London Underground map design.

title: Abzu
description: Dive into a beautiful underwater world full of mystery and wonder.
fun_fact: The game's title comes from ancient Sumerian mythology - 'Abzu' refers to the primordial sea.

title: Tetris Effect: Connected
description: The iconic puzzle game reimagined with stunning visuals and music.
fun_fact: Tetris was invented in 1984 by Soviet software engineer Alexey Pajitnov while working at the Soviet Academy of Sciences.

title: Journey
description: Travel through a mysterious desert towards a distant mountain.
fun_fact: Players can only communicate through musical chirps, yet deep emotional bonds form between strangers.

title: Flower
description: Guide flower petals through the wind in this serene experience.
fun_fact: The game was designed specifically as an emotional experience, not a traditional game.

title: Ori and the Blind Forest
description: A stunning platformer about a guardian spirit in a dying forest.
fun_fact: Moon Studios was a completely remote team from over 40 countries when they made this game!

title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps
description: Continue Ori's journey in this breathtaking sequel.
fun_fact: The soundtrack was recorded by a full symphony orchestra!

title: Firewatch
description: A mystery set in the Wyoming wilderness, told through radio conversations.
fun_fact: The entire game takes place in a single summer and can be completed in one sitting.

title: What Remains of Edith Finch
description: Explore a family's history through surreal, interconnected stories.
fun_fact: Each family member's story uses a completely different gameplay mechanic.

title: Gone Home
description: Return home to an empty house and uncover your family's secrets.
fun_fact: The game is set in 1995 and features authentic details from that era, including cassette tapes.

title: Dear Esther
description: Wander a desolate Hebridean island, piecing together a tragic story.
fun_fact: Originally a free Half-Life 2 mod, it helped pioneer the 'walking simulator' genre.

title: Everybody's Gone to the Rapture
description: Explore an English village where everyone has vanished.
fun_fact: The game features an original orchestral score recorded at Abbey Road Studios.

title: Return of the Obra Dinn
description: Solve the mystery of a ghost ship using a magical pocket watch.
fun_fact: Creator Lucas Pope spent 5 years developing this game entirely by himself.

title: Outer Wilds
description: Explore a solar system stuck in a 22-minute time loop.
fun_fact: The game's 22-minute time loop is exactly synced to the sun's supernova cycle.

title: The Witness
description: Explore a beautiful island filled with line puzzles that teach you their rules.
fun_fact: There are over 650 puzzles in the game, and creator Jonathan Blow spent 8 years designing them.

title: Baba Is You
description: Push words around to change the rules of each puzzle.
fun_fact: The game was originally created for a game jam in just 48 hours!

title: Monument Valley
description: Guide a princess through impossible architecture and optical illusions.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by the impossible constructions of M.C. Escher.

title: Monument Valley 2
description: A mother and daughter journey through impossible architecture.
fun_fact: The game explores themes of motherhood and letting go as children grow.

title: Alto's Adventure
description: Snowboard through serene alpine landscapes in this endless journey.
fun_fact: The game has a dedicated 'Zen Mode' with no scores or coins - just pure snowboarding.

title: Alto's Odyssey
description: Sandboard through stunning desert landscapes in this zen sequel.
fun_fact: The day-night cycle and weather system were procedurally generated for endless variety.

title: Prune
description: Shape trees to reach the light in this meditative puzzle game.
fun_fact: The game was designed as a meditation on growth and the beauty of nature.

title: Hidden Folks
description: Find hidden characters in hand-drawn landscapes full of interactive details.
fun_fact: All sound effects were made with the developer's mouth - no instruments or synthesizers!

title: Gorogoa
description: Manipulate illustrated panels to solve puzzles in this hand-drawn masterpiece.
fun_fact: The game took over 7 years to create, with all art hand-drawn by a single artist.

title: Donut County
description: Control a growing hole that swallows up an entire town.
fun_fact: The game was made by a single developer over 6 years and started as a Twitter joke.

title: Untitled Goose Game
description: Be a horrible goose and ruin everyone's day in a quaint English village.
fun_fact: The game started as a joke about a stock photo of a goose and became a viral sensation.

title: Slime Rancher
description: Wrangle adorable slimes on an alien planet far from Earth.
fun_fact: The game has over 150 different slime combinations you can create by feeding slimes to each other.

title: Slime Rancher 2
description: Continue ranching cute slimes on a mysterious rainbow island.
fun_fact: The sequel features a new conservatory system letting you build custom slime habitats.

title: House Flipper
description: Buy, renovate, and sell houses in this satisfying simulation.
fun_fact: The game was made by a small Polish studio and became one of Steam's top sellers.

title: Garden Story
description: Play as a grape rebuilding your community one garden at a time.
fun_fact: The game was funded through Kickstarter with overwhelming support from the cozy gaming community.

title: Littlewood
description: Rebuild your town after saving the world, with no memory of how you did it.
fun_fact: The game was made entirely by one developer who learned to code specifically to make this game.

title: My Time at Portia
description: Run your own workshop in a charming post-apocalyptic world.
fun_fact: The game is set in a post-apocalyptic world where society has rebuilt into a cozy civilization.

title: My Time at Sandrock
description: Build your workshop in a desert oasis community.
fun_fact: The sequel adds multiplayer so you can build your workshop with friends!

title: Ooblets
description: Farm, befriend ooblets, and compete in dance battles.
fun_fact: Instead of fighting, all conflicts in this game are resolved through dance battles!

title: Wylde Flowers
description: Farm by day, practice witchcraft by night in this magical life sim.
fun_fact: The game features fully voice-acted characters with over 30 hours of dialogue.

title: Coral Island
description: Farm and dive in a tropical paradise while restoring coral reefs.
fun_fact: The game was developed in Indonesia and features Southeast Asian-inspired aesthetics.

title: Sun Haven
description: Farm in a fantasy world with magic, monsters, and dragons.
fun_fact: The game features 8 playable races including elves, demons, and elementals.

title: Cattails
description: Live as a cat in the wild, hunting, exploring, and raising kittens.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by the Warriors book series about wild cat clans.

title: Calico
description: Run a cat cafe in a magical world where you can ride giant cats.
fun_fact: The game features rideable giant cats, including cats you can make enormous with potions!

title: Bear and Breakfast
description: Build and run a bed and breakfast as an adorable bear.
fun_fact: The game was made by a tiny Romanian studio called Gummy Cat.

title: Lemon Cake
description: Restore an old bakery and serve delicious treats to forest creatures.
fun_fact: The game features a ghost cat named Mango who helps you run your bakery.

title: Snacko
description: Play as cats building a farm and community on a mysterious island.
fun_fact: All characters in the game are adorable cats with distinct personalities.

title: Disney Dreamlight Valley
description: Build your dream Disney neighborhood with beloved characters.
fun_fact: Voice actors from the original Disney movies return to voice their characters in the game.

title: Palia
description: A cozy MMO where you farm, build, and explore with friends.
fun_fact: This is one of the first MMOs designed specifically for cozy gaming with no combat stress.

title: Cozy Grove
description: Camp on a haunted island and help ghost bears find peace.
fun_fact: The game is designed for short daily play sessions - new content unlocks each real-world day.

title: Fae Farm
description: Farm in a magical world where you can explore the realm of the fae.
fun_fact: The game supports 4-player co-op farming adventures.

title: Spirittea
description: Run a bathhouse for spirits in a rural town inspired by Spirited Away.
fun_fact: The game is heavily inspired by Spirited Away and Japanese rural life.

title: Stray
description: Play as a stray cat navigating a mysterious cyberpunk city.
fun_fact: The cat's movements were motion-captured from real cats, and a dedicated meow button exists.

title: TOEM
description: Embark on a photography adventure to capture the mysterious TOEM.
fun_fact: The entire game fits in under 500MB despite having hundreds of photos to take.

title: Tunic
description: An isometric adventure where you discover the game's secrets through an in-game manual.
fun_fact: The in-game manual is written in a fictional language that players decoded!

title: Chicory: A Colorful Tale
description: Paint the world back to life after all color mysteriously vanishes.
fun_fact: The game explores themes of imposter syndrome and creative burnout.

title: Webbed
description: Play as a tiny spider swinging through the world on webs.
fun_fact: You can actually create functional web structures using real spider physics!

title: Tinykin
description: Explore a giant house with tiny creatures like a 3D Pikmin.
fun_fact: The animation team studied real ant behavior for months to make the Tinykin feel alive.

title: A Little to the Left
description: Organize household objects into satisfying arrangements.
fun_fact: A mischievous cat occasionally disrupts your perfectly organized items.

title: Assemble with Care
description: Repair broken objects and discover the stories behind them.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of Monument Valley as an Apple Arcade exclusive.

title: Strange Horticulture
description: Run an occult plant shop and solve a dark mystery.
fun_fact: The game features over 70 unique plants, each with mysterious magical properties.

title: Potion Craft
description: Brew potions by navigating an alchemical map of ingredients.
fun_fact: The potion-making system uses a unique map-based mechanic unlike any other crafting game.

title: Venba
description: Cook traditional Tamil recipes while exploring immigrant family life.
fun_fact: The recipes in the game are real Tamil dishes that you can actually cook at home.

title: Season: A Letter to the Future
description: Document a dying world by bicycle before it's too late.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by real-world anthropology and the act of preserving culture.

title: I Was a Teenage Exocolonist
description: Grow up on an alien planet, making choices that shape your life.
fun_fact: The game has multiple endings that span 10 years of in-game time.

title: Coffee Talk Episode 2
description: Return to the late-night coffee shop for more heartfelt stories.
fun_fact: The original developer passed away before this sequel was completed; the team finished it in their honor.

title: Wayward Strand
description: Spend time with elderly patients on a floating hospital airship.
fun_fact: The game runs in real-time - characters have their own schedules and you can't see everything.

title: Garden In!
description: Arrange plants in a tiny digital zen garden.
fun_fact: The game features over 100 unique plants inspired by real botanical species.

title: Growbot
description: A young robot saves her space station using the power of flowers.
fun_fact: The entire game was illustrated in a handmade botanical art style.

title: Behind the Frame
description: Complete paintings while uncovering a touching love story.
fun_fact: The game's art style was inspired by Studio Ghibli animations.

title: Unpacking DLC
description: More rooms to unpack, more stories to discover.
fun_fact: The developers added new life stages based on player feedback.

title: Botany Manor
description: Grow rare plants by solving environmental puzzles in a Victorian manor.
fun_fact: Each plant requires unique conditions to grow, creating natural puzzle solutions.

title: Japanese Rural Life Adventure
description: Live a peaceful life in the Japanese countryside.
fun_fact: The game recreates authentic Japanese rural traditions and seasons.

title: A Building Full of Cats
description: Find hidden cats throughout a pixelated apartment building.
fun_fact: Each apartment tells a mini story about its residents through environmental details.

title: Tracks - Train Set Game
description: Build wooden train tracks and watch your trains go round.
fun_fact: The game recreates the feeling of playing with a real wooden train set.

title: Summerhouse
description: Build cozy little houses in peaceful scenes.
fun_fact: There are no goals or objectives - just pure creative building bliss.

title: Townscaper
description: Build quaint island towns by clicking and watching them grow.
fun_fact: The algorithm automatically generates doors, roofs, and details as you build.

title: Cloud Gardens
description: Grow plants over abandoned structures in meditative dioramas.
fun_fact: The game creates beauty from decay - nature reclaiming human structures.

title: Tiny Glade
description: Build cute castles and cottages with satisfying procedural tools.
fun_fact: Buildings automatically adapt and connect in pleasing ways as you draw.

title: Europa
description: Glide across the terraformed moon Europa in a Ghibli-inspired adventure.
fun_fact: The art style was directly inspired by the pastoral scenes of Studio Ghibli films.

title: Heaven's Vault
description: Translate an ancient language while uncovering a celestial civilization.
fun_fact: The game features a fully functional constructed language you must actually learn.

title: Mutazione
description: Explore a mutant community and tend magical musical gardens.
fun_fact: The musical gardens actually generate ambient music based on how you plant them.

title: NORCO
description: Investigate your mother's disappearance in industrial Louisiana.
fun_fact: The game is set in a real Louisiana refinery town and explores climate change themes.

title: Immortality
description: Investigate the disappearance of an actress across three decades of films.
fun_fact: The game features full-length films that you scrub through to find hidden secrets.

title: Genesis Noir
description: A noir love story set before, during, and after the Big Bang.
fun_fact: The game spans 14 billion years of cosmic history told through jazz and noir aesthetics.

title: Umurangi Generation
description: Document the end of the world through photography in a cyberpunk city.
fun_fact: The game was made by a Maori developer as commentary on climate change and colonialism.

title: Pentiment
description: Solve murders in 16th century Bavaria as an illuminated manuscript artist.
fun_fact: The art style mimics actual medieval illuminated manuscripts with period-accurate typography.

title: Eliza
description: Work as a counselor for an AI therapy app while questioning technology's role.
fun_fact: Made by the studio behind Opus Magnum and Infinifactory, this is their first narrative game.

title: Necrobarista
description: Run a coffee shop in Melbourne where the dead get one last night with the living.
fun_fact: The game was made by an Australian team and features Melbourne landmarks.

title: Boyfriend Dungeon
description: Date weapons that transform into attractive people.
fun_fact: The game includes a cat you can date who transforms into a brass knuckle.

title: Unpacking Zen Mode
description: Zen mode removes all hints for a pure unpacking experience.
fun_fact: Zen mode was added after players requested an even more relaxed experience.

title: Lonely Mountains: Downhill
description: Mountain bike down scenic trails at your own pace.
fun_fact: The low-poly art style was chosen to evoke the feeling of being alone in nature.

title: Art of Rally
description: A stylized rally game celebrating the golden era of racing.
fun_fact: The developer grew up watching rally racing with his father, inspiring this homage.

title: A Short Hike
description: Hike up a mountain at your own pace in this charming adventure.
fun_fact: This cozy game was made in just 1 month for a game jam and later expanded!

title: Alba: A Wildlife Adventure
description: Save a nature reserve during a Mediterranean summer vacation.
fun_fact: The studio plants a real tree for every copy of the game sold.

title: Lake
description: Deliver mail in a small Oregon town during a 1980s summer.
fun_fact: The game was inspired by the feeling of returning to your hometown after years away.

title: Afterparty
description: Outdrink Satan to escape from Hell.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of Oxenfree, featuring the same unique dialogue system.

title: Kind Words
description: Write and receive anonymous letters of support with strangers.
fun_fact: The game has facilitated millions of kind messages between strangers worldwide.

title: Art Sqool
description: Attend art school with an AI professor that grades your creations.
fun_fact: The AI professor 'Froshmin' uses neural networks to generate absurd art prompts.

title: Nainai's Recipe
description: Cook with your Chinese grandmother while sharing family memories.
fun_fact: The game was created to preserve the developer's own family recipes and stories.

title: Making it Home
description: Navigate the emotional and practical challenges of moving homes.
fun_fact: The game explores the real emotional weight of moving and starting fresh.

title: Last Stop
description: Three strangers in London have their lives intertwined by supernatural events.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of Virginia, featuring distinct British voice acting.

title: Summertime Madness
description: Explore living paintings to escape a deal with the devil.
fun_fact: Each painting world is inspired by different art movements from Impressionism to Surrealism.

title: Eastshade
description: Travel as a painter capturing the beauty of a fantastical island.
fun_fact: You actually paint in-game canvases that you can display in your inventory.

title: Shelter 2
description: Survive as a lynx mother raising your cubs in the wild.
fun_fact: The game has no UI - everything is told through visuals and sound.

title: Wandersong
description: Save the world by singing! A bard's musical adventure.
fun_fact: Every puzzle is solved through singing using a color-wheel interface.

title: Spirit of the North
description: Explore Iceland's landscapes as a fox guided by the Northern Lights.
fun_fact: The game features no dialogue - the story is told entirely through environmental details.

title: ABZU: The Depths
description: Dive deeper into the beautiful underwater world full of mystery.
fun_fact: The game's title comes from ancient Sumerian mythology - 'Abzu' refers to the primordial sea.

title: RiME
description: A boy washes up on a mysterious island and begins an emotional journey.
fun_fact: The final chapter recontextualizes the entire game in a deeply emotional way.

title: Sayonara Wild Hearts
description: A pop album video game about heartbreak and motorcycles.
fun_fact: The game was designed as a playable pop album with each level as a song.

title: Bound
description: Dance through abstract worlds as a princess protecting her kingdom.
fun_fact: The protagonist's movements were motion-captured from a real ballerina.

title: Omno
description: Journey through ancient wonders in a land of mystical creatures.
fun_fact: The entire game was made by a single developer over five years.

title: Arise: A Simple Story
description: Relive memories by controlling time in this emotional journey.
fun_fact: The game tells a love story spanning an entire lifetime through wordless chapters.

title: Sable
description: Explore a vast desert on your hoverbike during a coming-of-age journey.
fun_fact: The unique art style was inspired by French comic artist Moebius.

title: Lost Ember
description: Possess different animals to explore a post-human world.
fun_fact: You can play as over 10 different animals from fish to parrots to elephants.

title: LostWinds
description: Control the wind to guide a boy through beautiful landscapes.
fun_fact: Originally a WiiWare launch title, it pioneered motion control puzzle design.

title: The Artful Escape
description: A teenage guitar prodigy embarks on a cosmic musical journey.
fun_fact: Features voice acting from Carl Weathers and other surprise Hollywood talent.

title: Neverending Nightmares
description: Navigate nightmares in a hand-drawn psychological horror game.
fun_fact: The developer created the game based on his real experiences with OCD and depression.

title: Feather
description: Fly as a bird through serene island landscapes.
fun_fact: There are no goals, enemies, or points - just pure flight exploration.

title: AER: Memories of Old
description: Transform into a bird to explore floating islands and ancient ruins.
fun_fact: The transformation between human and bird forms is seamless and instant.

title: Tasomachi: Behind the Twilight
description: Explore abandoned towns in a mystical Far Eastern setting.
fun_fact: The game was almost entirely created by one Japanese developer.

title: Haven
description: A couple in love stranded on a strange planet, surviving together.
fun_fact: The game was designed for couples to play together on the couch.

title: Garden Paws
description: Run a farm as an adorable animal in a magical world.
fun_fact: You can play as various cute animals including bunnies, cats, and dragons.

title: Sumire
description: Experience one perfect day guided by a magical flower.
fun_fact: The game takes place over a single day and explores themes of grief and hope.

title: Where Cards Fall
description: Build houses of cards to navigate memories and dreams.
fun_fact: The game explores the delicate nature of relationships through card house metaphors.

title: The Pathless
description: Run and glide through a mystical forest as a hunter with an eagle.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of ABZU, featuring similarly fluid movement.

title: Hohokum
description: Float through vibrant worlds as a colorful snake-like creature.
fun_fact: The game has no UI, tutorials, or text - pure exploration and discovery.

title: Pikuniku
description: A blob-like creature solves puzzles and kicks things in a silly world.
fun_fact: The game features a dedicated kick button that solves most problems.

title: Old Man's Journey
description: Reshape hills and valleys as an old man reflects on his life.
fun_fact: The game was created by a team in Vienna and won multiple awards for its narrative.

title: Wattam
description: Make friends in a colorful world where everything wants to hold hands.
fun_fact: Made by the creator of Katamari Damacy, featuring the same joyful absurdity.

title: Niche
description: Evolve your own species of animals through genetics.
fun_fact: The game teaches real genetics principles used in biology education.

title: Equilinox
description: Create and nurture your own living ecosystem.
fun_fact: Made by a solo developer who also created Thin Matrix's OpenGL tutorials.

title: The Gardens Between
description: Manipulate time to solve puzzles and explore a friendship.
fun_fact: The game has no dialogue or text - the entire story is told through visuals.

title: Night in the Woods
description: Return to your hometown as a cat who dropped out of college.
fun_fact: The game was crowdfunded and explores themes of mental health and small-town decay.

title: Oxenfree
description: Tune into supernatural signals on a mysterious island with friends.
fun_fact: The dialogue system allows characters to talk over each other naturally.

title: Oxenfree II: Lost Signals
description: Return to the supernatural mystery years later as an adult.
fun_fact: The sequel explores what happens when you grow up but the supernatural still calls.

title: Heaven Dust 2
description: Solve puzzles and survive in a zombie-filled mansion.
fun_fact: The game is an homage to classic Resident Evil with isometric pixel art.

title: We Are OFK
description: Follow an indie band's journey through the LA music scene.
fun_fact: Features real songs by the fictional band OFK that you can stream.

title: Inmost
description: Three characters' stories intertwine in a dark, emotional puzzle platformer.
fun_fact: The game deals with heavy themes of loss and depression through metaphor.

title: Little Misfortune
description: A dark fairytale about a child following a mysterious voice.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of Fran Bow, featuring the same dark whimsy.

title: Fran Bow
description: A young girl with mental illness searches for her cat in a dark world.
fun_fact: The game features two parallel realities accessed through mysterious pills.

title: Creaks
description: Descend through a strange mansion filled with furniture monsters.
fun_fact: Made by the creators of Machinarium with hand-drawn animation.

title: Machinarium
description: A little robot solves puzzles in a hand-drawn steampunk city.
fun_fact: The entire game was hand-drawn by one artist over several years.

title: Botanicula
description: Five tiny creatures save their tree from evil parasites.
fun_fact: Made by Amanita Design, featuring unique sound design by DVA.

title: Samorost 3
description: A space gnome explores surreal planets with his magic flute.
fun_fact: The backgrounds combine real photographs with hand-drawn art.

title: Chuchel
description: A fuzzy creature chases a cherry through absurd situations.
fun_fact: The main character was redesigned after release due to unintended racial parallels.

title: Pilgrims
description: A playful card-based adventure game about helping strangers.
fun_fact: Made by Amanita Design as a smaller experimental project.

title: Happy Game
description: A boy's happy dreams turn into surreal nightmares.
fun_fact: Despite the name, this is Amanita Design's darkest and most disturbing game.

title: Cocoon
description: Carry worlds within worlds and use them to solve puzzles.
fun_fact: Made by the lead designer of LIMBO and INSIDE!

title: Limbo
description: A boy searches for his sister in a dark, hostile world.
fun_fact: The game uses only black, white, and gray to create its haunting atmosphere.

title: Inside
description: A boy infiltrates a sinister facility in this wordless puzzle platformer.
fun_fact: The animation system uses inverse kinematics to create eerily realistic movement.

title: The Last Campfire
description: Help lost souls find their way in a mysterious ember's journey.
fun_fact: Made by Hello Games (No Man's Sky) as a small passion project.

title: Forgotton Anne
description: Rule a world of forgotten things as an enforcer seeking to return home.
fun_fact: The game was animated entirely frame-by-frame in a classic anime style.
